title: Postgres configuration typo in n8n setup
symptom: n8n fails to connect to Postgres and defaults to SQLite, with no error logs indicating the issue.
applies_when: Using Postgres as the intended database
not_this_if: Error messages indicate a different issue
root_cause: The configuration for the database type was incorrectly specified as 'postgres' instead of the required 'postgresdb'. This typo prevents n8n from recognizing the intended database type and leads to defaulting to SQLite.
fix_steps: Restart n8n to apply the new configuration
agent_instruction: Correct the database type in your configuration file and restart n8n.
